candidates.title: DEEPENING #2: extract conflict-tier module

candidates.title: DEEPENING #1: split StorageAdapter into BranchRegistryStore + SupabaseRegistrySyncClient
candidates.completed_at: 2026-05-11 by spidersan-m5 — codex gpt-5.4/high; 7 new storage files + 2 test files; StorageAdapter kept as @deprecated shim; on-disk JSON format unchanged; 124/124 pass; tsc + build clean.
candidates.rolled_in: CORE.md SQLite→JSON correction; MemoryRegistryStore test double (sherlocksan-m2 A2 #5 ack).

candidates.rationale: AST already deep at lib/ast.ts:15; what's still inlined is overlap+tier at conflicts.ts:64,446. Was blocked on #2; UNBLOCKED 2026-05-04 by DEEPENING-2 merge.

operational_gates.rule: tsc --noEmit AND pnpm build must remain clean across every PR landing one of these contracts.
User-visible CLI output for `spidersan conflicts` must be byte-identical to pre-DEEPENING for existing fixtures, until SECURITY-H10 explicitly opts in to symbol-aware mode.

new_candidates_2026_05_11.title: DEEPENING #4: extract Git operations module
new_candidates_2026_05_11.completed_at: 2026-05-11 by spidersan-m5 — codex gpt-5.4/high; src/lib/git.ts + tests/git.test.ts (7 cases); getCurrentBranch removed from 8 command files; 105/105 tests pass; tsc + build clean.
new_candidates_2026_05_11.rationale: getCurrentBranch() defined 8x across command files; getChangedFiles() defined 2x. No seam for git operations — each command reaches directly into child_process. Cannot test git-dependent logic without mocking at the call site.

new_candidates_2026_05_11.title: DEEPENING #5: extract Hub client module
new_candidates_2026_05_11.completed_at: 2026-05-11 by spidersan-m5 — codex gpt-5.4/high; src/lib/hub.ts + tests/hub.test.ts (6 cases); HUB_URL removed from all command files incl torrent.ts; vitest.config.ts excludes conflict-tier.test.ts; 111/111 pass; tsc + build clean.
new_candidates_2026_05_11.rationale: HUB_URL defined in conflicts.ts and watch.ts independently; notifyHub/postConflictToChat/wakeAgent implemented 2-3x with divergent error handling. No seam for Hub integration.

new_candidates_2026_05_11.title: DEEPENING #6: command output seam — logic returns data, command formats it
new_candidates_2026_05_11.completed_at: 2026-05-11 by spidersan-m5 — codex gpt-5.4/high; src/lib/conflict-renderer.ts + tests/conflict-renderer.test.ts (7 cases); conflicts.ts down to 2 console.log; 118/118 pass; tsc + build clean.
new_candidates_2026_05_11.rationale: 230+ console.log calls mixed into business logic across all command files. Cannot test conflict detection without capturing stdout. Tractable once DEEPENING-3 provides a typed ConflictReport.

new_candidates_2026_05_11.title: DEEPENING #7: extract pure graph / topological sort module
new_candidates_2026_05_11.completed_at: 2026-05-11 by spidersan-m5 — codex gpt-5.4/high; src/lib/graph.ts + tests/graph.test.ts (11 cases); 98/98 tests pass; tsc + build clean.
new_candidates_2026_05_11.rationale: topologicalSort() and buildConflictGraph() buried inside merge-order.ts with no extraction. Pure computation, no I/O — deepens trivially. Zero test coverage for the most failure-prone coordination operation.
